title: Go URL Shortener with In-Memory Storage and REST API

steps.description:
Implement the full feature in main.go — single-binary go project

Feature requirements: build a URL shortener REST API in Go with in-memory storage
steps.done_condition: main.go compiles and fully implements: build a URL shortener REST API in Go with in-memory storage; go.mod has correct dependencies

riskRegister.mitigation: Use atomic operations and collision detection in short code generation
riskRegister.risk: Short code collisions in concurrent environment

riskRegister.mitigation: Document memory limitations and provide clear migration path to persistent storage
riskRegister.risk: Memory usage growth with large URL datasets

successCriteria: REST API accepts POST /urls and returns short URL
GET /{shortCode} redirects to original URL with proper HTTP status codes
In-memory storage handles concurrent access safely
All hex architecture boundaries respected with proper dependency direction
Service starts as single binary with no external dependencies
